all.en: Dear Ms. Chen, we are pleased to share important news about your compensation.
all.zh: 親愛的陳女士，我們很高興與您分享有關您薪酬的重要訊息。

all.en: Following our annual review cycle, your base salary will be adjusted upward.
all.zh: 經年度檢視後，您的底薪將獲得向上調整。

all.en: This adjustment reflects your strong contributions over the past year.
all.zh: 此次調整反映您過去一年的卓越貢獻。

all.en: Your new annual base salary will be one million two hundred thousand NTD.
all.zh: 您新的年度底薪為新台幣一百二十萬元。

all.en: This represents an increase of approximately seven percent over your prior rate.
all.zh: 此金額較您先前薪資增加約百分之七。

all.en: The adjusted rate will take effect on the first day of next month.
all.zh: 調整後的薪資將自下個月一日起生效。

all.en: It will be reflected in the payroll deposit at the end of that month.
all.zh: 並將於該月月底的薪資撥款中反映。

all.en: In addition, your performance bonus for the year totals eighty thousand NTD.
all.zh: 此外，您的年度績效獎金合計新台幣八萬元。

all.en: The bonus payment will be issued together with next month standard payroll.
all.zh: 獎金將與下個月的常規薪資一同發放。

all.en: Your equity grant will also be refreshed under the standard four-year schedule.
all.zh: 您的股權授予也將依標準四年期程獲得續發。

all.en: Specific equity details will be sent through the stock plan administrator portal.
all.zh: 詳細股權資訊將透過股票計畫管理入口寄出。

all.en: Your benefits package remains unchanged at the current premium tier.
all.zh: 您的福利方案維持現行最高等級不變。

all.en: This decision was made based on multiple performance and market factors.
all.zh: 本決定係依據多項績效及市場因素做出。

all.en: We considered your individual results, peer benchmarks, and external salary surveys.
all.zh: 我們參考了您的個人成果、同儕基準及外部薪資調查。

all.en: Your willingness to mentor junior colleagues stood out in this review cycle.
all.zh: 您願意指導資淺同仁的表現於本次檢視中尤其突出。

all.en: Your leadership during last quarter product launch was particularly impressive.
all.zh: 您於上一季產品上市期間的領導表現尤其令人印象深刻。

all.en: We hope this adjustment reflects how much we value your continued commitment.
all.zh: 我們希望此調整能反映我們對您持續投入的高度重視。

all.en: Please remember that compensation information is strictly confidential.
all.zh: 請切記薪酬資訊屬於嚴格機密。

all.en: Share these details only with your direct family or financial advisor.
all.zh: 請僅與直系親屬或財務顧問分享相關細節。

all.en: Should you have any questions, please contact the human resources business partner.
all.zh: 若有任何疑問，請聯絡您的人資業務夥伴。

all.en: Please acknowledge receipt by signing the electronic letter within seven days.
all.zh: 請於七日內簽署電子信函以確認收到。

all.en: Thank you for the dedication and integrity you bring to our organization.
all.zh: 感謝您為本組織帶來的投入與誠信。

all.en: We look forward to your continued growth in the coming year.
all.zh: 我們期待您於來年持續成長。
